name: I-Cefazolin
description: I-cephalosporin yesizukulwane sokuqala. I-antibiotic yomugqa wokuqala we-parenteral yezifo ezinzima zezilonda kanye ne-prophylaxis yokuhlinzwa. Ukufakwa okuhle kwe-gram-positive kuhlanganise ne-MSSA. Nikeza phakathi kwemizuzu engama-60 yokuhlinza ukuze uthole i-prophylaxis.
dose: 1-2g IV/IM q8h. I-prophylaxis yokuhlinzwa: 2g IV phakathi nemizuzu engama-60 ngaphambi kokusikwa. Phinda u-2g uma ukuhlinzwa> amahora angu-4.
window: Nge-prophylaxis yokuhlinzwa: nika phakathi kwemizuzu engama-60 yokusika.
warnings: I-Cross-reactivity nge-penicillin yokungezwani komzimba: sebenzisa ngokuqapha ezigulini ze-penicillin-allergic.

pediatric.dose: 25-50 mg/kg IV/IM q8h (ubukhulu obungu-2g/umthamo). I-Prophylaxis: 30 mg/kg (ubukhulu obungu-2g) ngaphambi kokusikwa.
pediatric.note: Iphephile futhi ifundwe kahle kwezokwelapha zezingane.

obstetric.note: Iphephile ekukhulelweni nasekunceliseni. I-antibiotic ethandwayo ye-parenteral yezinqubo zokubelethisa.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Surgical Prophylaxis
